---
title: "Supervision"
---

# Supervision

I welcome enquiries from students interested in health economics, discrete choice experiments, behavioural economics, eye tracking, health policy evaluation, telehealth, vaccination policy, clinical outcomes assessment and economic evaluation.

## Suitable topics

- Patient and public preferences in healthcare
- Discrete choice experiments and stated preference methods
- Eye tracking and information processing in health decisions
- Behavioural health economics
- Telehealth and digital health
- Vaccine policy and public health mandates
- Health technology assessment and value assessment
- Applied economic evaluation and decision tools

## Prospective students

Please send a short research statement, CV, academic transcript, writing sample and any publications or working papers.
